DP.143.0000:
I’ve had enough of shopping for
a while.\f
I’ll grab a drink and unwind a bit.
DP.143.0001:
I’ve shopped here loyally for years.
Now they consider me a regular! Ha!
DP.143.0002:
Ah, young Pokémon Trainer...\f
As your senior in life, let me make
a gift of this Sticky Barb!\f
DP.143.0003:
That Sticky Barb is a hold item.
If the Pokémon holding it is hit...\f
The Sticky Barb sticks to the foe
and inflicts damage!
DP.143.0004:
Two buff guys standing side by side.
That’s all. What? What’s the problem?
DP.143.0005:
1F: Trainers’ Zone\f
2F: Battle Collection\f
3F: TM Corner\f
4F: Poké Dolls & Goods\f
5F: Rooftop Plaza
DP.143.0006:
It’s a Vending Machine.
Which drink would you like?
DP.143.0007:
Clang!\f
A can of [0108,0000] dropped
down.\f
DP.143.0008:
Clang!\f
Bonus! Another can of [0108,0000]
dropped down.\f
DP.143.0010: Decided not to buy a drink.
